title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 87.
content:
There was an Old Person of Anerley,
    Whose conduct was strange and unmannerly;
    He rushed down the Strand,
    With a Pig in each hand,
    But returned in the evening to Anerley.
meaning:
"Book Of Nonsense Limerick 87." is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
